title: W4W Kadima Beach Paddle Ball Racket Set - Bundle Pack Includes 4 Balls & 2 Paddles
features: Sets Include 2 Matkot Rackets & 4 Balls - the racquets are made out of high quality water resistant & sand proof wooden materials – Perfect for outdoor beach tennis or sports games by the pool – Great game for all ages kids , teens and adults, boys and girls, men and women

These racquetball sets are official regulation size: Each Paddle measures 9.6 inches wide X 15.5 inches long X 3/8th inch thick & weighs 10.3 oz. The handle is designed with a textured pattern in order to reduce slippage and give you extra grip

Set of 4 official size W4W Paddleballs included– Each ball measures 1.25 inches diameter & weighs .5 ounces to give you that perfect bounce and control. The vibrant colors allow the ball to glow in order to ensure high visibility. The balls are waterproof & float in water. Compatible with Smash Ball, ProKadima, Matkot, Beach paddle ball, and all Racquet ball sets.

Fun travel sport, play anywhere, no net required - Fits in every bag, perfect for summer beach activities, traveling, camping, or just playing with your family in the backyard, front yard, or lawn. No additional equipment or accessories needed unlike ping pong, table tennis,tetherball, beach bat, badminton, paddle board & pickleball.

With this classic raquet ball set, you’ll never be bored, bring it as a gift to a party or just a fun toy for a kid or an adult. Great for birthdays or even Christmas & Easter gifts. The best way to exercise while having fun.Each paddleball set includes 2 Pro Kadima professional wood rackets & 4 W4W Replacement balls.
